title: 函館スプリントSの後に・1200！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O clinches a perfect sprint start,
determined to smash the 3,600 meters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The arduous battle continues, but Sakura
Bakushin O refuses to falter... She storms her way
to the CBC Sho!
